General.Name: Kuangchi Science Ltd
General.Description: Genesis Scale Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the research, development, and manufacturing of products for technology business in the People's Republic of China. The company offers KC-N90, an intelligent epidemic prevention helmet; KC-PH2, a police smart helmet for public security business; streaming forwarding services; KcFace, a face dynamic comparison engine; and motor vehicle license plate recognition products. It also provides technical support services based on AI technology; administrative, procurement, and space services. In addition, the company is involved in innovative technology business; and property holding activities. The company was formerly known as KuangChi Science Limited and changed its name to Genesis Scale Holdings Limited in December 2025. Genesis Scale Holdings Limited was incorporated in 1992 and is headquartered in Causeway Bay, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Leighton Centre, Causeway Bay, Hong Kong
